/about.title: My Framer Site
p: As a management company and label, we work closely with artists at every stage of their career, developing their vision, guiding their releases, and building the infrastructure around their music with a long-term perspective.
As a sound design studio, we create original sonic work for film, advertising, interactive media, and brand identity, spanning sound branding, original score, custom SFX, and spatial audio.
